plainLyrics:
I been fuckin' hoes and poppin' pillies
Man, I feel just like a rockstar
All my brothers got that gas and they always be smokin' like a rockstar
Fuckin' with me, call up on the Uzi and show up, man, them the shat-tots
When my homies pull up on your block, they make that thing go grata-tata
Switch my whip, came back in black, I'm starting sayin' recipes to bond scott
Close that doughy blowin' smoke, they ask me like a fire, like a morson
Act a fool on stage, probably leave my fuckin' show in a cop-cop
Shit was legendary through a TV, I don't even know what I'm on top
Skokin' on the table, lick a porn, don't give a damn
Do Joe Devon is a group, he's just tryin' to get in
Sayin' I'm with the band
Ay, ay, now she actin' out of pocket, tryin' to grab up on my pants
On their beaches in my trellis, they ain't got a man
And they all brought a friend
Ay, ay, I been fuckin' hoes and poppin' pillies
Man, I feel just like a rockstar
All my brothers got that gas and they always be smokin' like a rockstar
Fuckin' with me, call up on the Uzi and show up, man, them the shat-tots
My homies pull up on your block, they make that thing go grata-tata
I been in the hills, fuckin' superstars, feelin' like a popstar
Drunk in any bad bitches, jumpin' in the pool and they ain't got no bra
Get up from the back, pullin' on the tracks and now she screamin' out no amaz
They like savage, why you got a 12 car garage and you only got six cars
I ain't with the cake and how you kiss that
Yo wifey say I'm lookin' like a hoe snap
Green Hunnys, in my safe, I got a whole racks
LA bitches always askin' where the coke at
Livin' like a rockstar, smash that on the cop car
Sweeter than a pop tart, you know you are not hard
I done made the hot chart, remember I used to chop hard
Livin' like a rockstar, I'm livin' like a rockstar
I been fuckin' hoes and poppin' pillies
Man, I feel just like a rockstar
All my brothers got that gas and they always be smokin' like a rockstar
Fuckin' with me, call up on the Uzi and show up in him the Chattos
My homies pull up on your block, they make that thing go grata-ta-ta
